name: Cascada de Eguna – circular gravel from Ubidea
name_original: Cascada de Eguna – circular gravel desde Ubidea
region_intro: Touring cycling around Ubide offers routes through the heart of the Basque Country, characterized by mountainous terrain and lush green pastures. The region provides access to the landscapes of Urkiola Natural Park and Gorbeia Natural Park, featuring diverse ecosystems and valleys. These areas present a backdrop for cycling, with natural features such as Otzarreta and Saldropo. The terrain includes both challenging ascents and scenic valley paths. Best touring cycling routes around Ubide The most popular touring cycling route is Cascada de Eguna – circular gravel from Ubidea, an 11.4 miles (18.3 km) trail that takes 1 hour 28 minutes to complete. This route features a gravel surface and passes by the Cascada de Eguna. Another top favourite among local touring cyclists is Landa Recreation Area – The Arlaban Pass loop from Legutio, a difficult 18.7 miles (30.1 km) path. This route offers significant elevation gains through varied landscapes. Local touring cyclists also love the Otxandio – Urkiola Sanctuary loop from Otxandio, a 25.8 miles (41.6 km) trail leading through mountainous terrain, often completed in about 3 hours 54 minutes. Touring cycling around Ubide is defined by Basque mountains, green pastures, and the natural features of Urkiola and Gorbeia Natural Parks. The network offers options for various ability levels, from moderate paths to more challenging routes with significant elevation. The routes in Ubide are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 5.0 stars from over 1 review. More than 200 touring cyclists have used komoot to explore Ubide's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many touring cycling routes are available around Ubide?
A: There are over 20 touring cycling routes around Ubide, offering a variety of experiences. These include 1 easy route, 7 moderate routes, and 14 difficult routes, catering to different skill levels.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on touring cycling routes near Ubide?
A: Touring cycling around Ubide is characterized by the mountainous terrain and lush green pastures of the Basque Country. You'll encounter diverse ecosystems, challenging ascents, and scenic valley paths, especially within the &lt;strong&gt;Urkiola Natural Park&lt;/strong&gt; and &lt;strong&gt;Gorbeia Natural Park&lt;/strong&gt;.

Q: Are there touring cycling routes suitable for families or beginners in Ubide?
A: Yes, there is at least one easy touring cycling route available. The region offers options for various ability levels, including moderate paths that can be suitable for families or those new to touring cycling, though many routes feature significant elevation gains.

Q: Can I find circular touring cycling routes around Ubide?
A: Yes, several routes are designed as loops. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1086264910/cascada-de-eguna-circular-gravel-from-ubidea" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cascada de Eguna – circular gravel from Ubidea&lt;/a&gt; is an 11.4-mile circular route that takes you past the Cascada de Eguna waterfall.

Q: What natural features or landmarks can I see along the touring cycling routes?
A: The routes often pass through or near the stunning &lt;strong&gt;Urkiola Natural Park&lt;/strong&gt; and &lt;strong&gt;Gorbeia Natural Park&lt;/strong&gt;. You might encounter natural features like Otzarreta and Saldropo. Specific highlights include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3009759" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Uguzpe Waterfall&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/628313" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Urkiola Sanctuary&lt;/a&gt;. The route &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1086264910/cascada-de-eguna-circular-gravel-from-ubidea" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cascada de Eguna – circular gravel from Ubidea&lt;/a&gt; directly features the Cascada de Eguna.

Q: Are there any waterfalls accessible by bike near Ubide?
A: Yes, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1086264910/cascada-de-eguna-circular-gravel-from-ubidea" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cascada de Eguna – circular gravel from Ubidea&lt;/a&gt; route takes you directly past the Cascada de Eguna. Additionally, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3009759" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Uguzpe Waterfall&lt;/a&gt; is another notable natural monument in the vicinity.

Q: What do other touring cyclists say about the routes around Ubide?
A: The touring cycling routes around Ubide are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 5.0 stars. Over 200 touring cyclists have explored this varied terrain, often praising the beautiful Basque mountains and green pastures.

Q: Are there challenging touring cycling routes for experienced cyclists?
A: Absolutely. Ubide offers 14 difficult touring cycling routes with significant elevation gains, perfect for experienced cyclists seeking a challenge. An example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31926747" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Landa Recreation Area – The Arlaban Pass loop from Legutio&lt;/a&gt;, a difficult 18.7-mile path with substantial climbing.

Q: Is public transport available for cyclists to reach the Ubide area or Gorbeia Natural Park?
A: While specific public transport options for cyclists directly to Ubide are not detailed, the Basque Country has a well-established infrastructure. It's advisable to check local bus or train services for their bicycle policies when planning your trip to the region or to access areas like Gorbeia Natural Park.

Q: Where can I park my car when starting a touring cycling route near Ubide?
A: Parking availability will vary depending on your chosen starting point. Many routes begin from towns like Ubide or Otxandio, where public parking may be available. For routes within natural parks like Gorbeia, designated parking areas are often provided at trailheads.

Q: Are there places to eat or stay overnight for touring cyclists in Ubide?
A: Ubide and the surrounding towns in the Basque Country offer various amenities for visitors. You can find cafes and restaurants to refuel, as well as accommodation options. It's recommended to check in advance for establishments that are specifically bike-friendly or offer secure bike storage.

Q: What makes touring cycling in Ubide unique compared to other regions?
A: Ubide's uniqueness stems from its strategic location within the Basque Country, a heartland for cycling in Spain. It offers direct access to the natural grandeur of &lt;strong&gt;Urkiola&lt;/strong&gt; and &lt;strong&gt;Gorbeia Natural Parks&lt;/strong&gt;, combining challenging mountainous terrain with lush green pastures and a strong local cycling culture. This provides a diverse and engaging experience, from serene natural stops to routes connecting charismatic towns.
